meta.title: Swap Right Command & Option on macOS
hero.title:
Swap Right ⌘ & ⌥,
one command.
hero.subtitle: Swap Right Command and Right Option keys on macOS. Applied instantly, persists across reboots. No app to install.
hero.hint: Works on macOS. No dependencies. No restart needed.
polish.title: Great for Polish users
polish.desc: Polish diacritics (ą ę ś ć ż ź ó ł ń) are typed with Right Option + letter. On many external keyboards, Right Option is where Command sits on the MacBook — this swap fixes that.
install.title: Installation
install.desc: One command to download and activate the key swap. Works on any Mac.
install.terminal_hint: Downloads the LaunchAgent plist to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ and loads it immediately.
install.step1: Save the plist file to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/
install.uninstall: To uninstall, see uninstall instructions on GitHub.
